title: Add "AND" conditional logic to questions

posts.author: joaoalduan (João Alduan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be extremely helpful to support “AND” conditional logic when setting up the logic for questions.

Currently, it only supports “OR” logic when setting up the conditions (e.g., show a question if Question 1 = X OR Question 2 = Y). The “AND” logic would allow questions to appear only when multiple conditions are true simultaneously.

For example:

  • Question 1: Do you have a driver’s license? (Yes/No)
  • Question 2: What is your age range? (Under 18/Over 18)
  • Question 3 (conditional → “Yes” & “Over 18”): What type of vehicle do you drive most often?

What are you trying to achieve

  • More precise and dynamic logic
  • Reduce the need to duplicate question or create complex workarounds
  • Cleaner and more personalized experience
  • Matches the flexibility you can find in many other advanced form builders

posts.author: syweinrib (Shlomo Weinrib)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have this feature as well! I hope they can build this in, to make WorkForms even more powerful!

posts.author: murphyslcp (Seth Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I came here to request the same thing! I am working on a form for a client and discovered an instance where multiple field values must apply in order for other fields to be presented.

Example:

Is this a new or existing product? (New/Existing) → New
Who is the Product Owner? (Single Select, Dropdown) → XYZ, Inc.

If New AND “XYZ, Inc.” display:
Country of Origin (Country)
Tariff Harmonized Code (Short Text)
Commercial Value (Number)
Commercial Product Description (Long Text)

While this post has not received many upvotes, I believe this feature has the potential to deliver high impact with relatively low development effort.
